title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (p), PAGE 281, PARAGRAPH f, GROUP IV FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2644 / 57 OG No. 5, 805 (January 30, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2764, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (p), PAGE 281, PARAGRAPH f, GROUP IV FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

p

), page 281, paragraph

f

, Group IV for the Province of Iloilo, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(p) Licoan Elementary School, construction of additional rooms P5,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
